description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest print FittingComfortWashcare Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Impress your granny instead of that cute neighbour, for a change!
